logistics_cost_model.distance_basis: road_distance_km when routed; heuristic road estimate otherwise
logistics_cost_model.cost_formula: per_trip_cost = road_distance_km / fuel_efficiency_km_per_liter * fuel_cost + duration_min / 60 * driver_count * labor_cost
logistics_cost_model.mvp_note: Use this as a comparable planning score until an approved routing provider and vehicle-capacity model are connected.

direct_sources: NGMS 명세서배출량정보공개: 업체명, 대상년도, 지정구분, 부문, 계획업종, 온실가스배출량, 에너지사용량
한국에너지공단 에너지다소비사업자 에너지 사용 현황: 지역/부문별 에너지·전력 집계
energy_capacity_model.interpretation: Large reported energy or electricity use is a useful production-scale proxy, but it is not the same as spare capacity or immediate conversion readiness.
limitations: Company-level NGMS records cover large emitting/managed entities only.
KEPCO/KEA public electricity data is generally aggregated by region and sector, not every factory.
High energy use can mean high output, but can also mean inefficient processes or low spare capacity.
Final mobilization decisions still require live line availability, workforce, equipment, inventory, and grid reliability checks.

factory_capacity_model.interpretation: Production volume is an evidence-weighted public-data estimate for route planning. It is not verified mobilization capacity or guaranteed spare line capacity.
primary_sources: 한국산업단지공단 전국등록공장현황_20200229: employees, area, industry, product, factory management number
NGMS/KEA energy context: direct large-emitter energy records where matched; otherwise regional industrial proxy
factory_capacity_model.score_formula: capacity_index = 0.25 production_fit + 0.18 physical_scale + 0.17 workforce + 0.14 transaction_history + 0.10 financial_scale + 0.08 certification_quality + 0.04 technology_signal + 0.04 logistics_access
limitations: Open data can estimate likely operating scale but cannot prove spare capacity.
Exact equipment inventory, shift availability, inventory, QA status, and emergency power require verification.
Older rich factory registry rows may differ from the latest lightweight registry snapshot.

power_grid_risk_model.interpretation: Public data can support regional load-serving risk and factory outage sensitivity, but it should not be treated as a verified substation-to-factory dependency map.
primary_sources: 한국전력공사_전력고객주요정보_대용량고객일반정보: 대용량 고객, 변전소/배전설비, 용량, 점검기준 등 공개 메타데이터
한국에너지공단 에너지다소비사업자 에너지 사용 현황: 지역/산업 전력사용량
OpenStreetMap power tags: optional public power infrastructure context for future coarse validation
safe_modeling_boundary: Use province/city-cluster load-serving zones rather than exact electric-facility dependency chains.
Expose impact as production-continuity risk, not as an attack target list.
Treat all dependencies as proxy estimates until KEPCO/customer-side supply contracts and facility diagrams are verified.

limitations: Rows support regional power-demand and equipment-context screening.
Rows do not prove a specific factory's customer-side feeder or outage dependency.
Use aggregated province/city-cluster signals for continuity planning.

operations_state_model.interpretation: Frozen orders, in-transit shipments, and WIP/inventory are synthetic operational ledgers anchored to the current demo plan. Replace with ERP/MES/TMS feeds for production use.

routing_design.optional_estimate_mode: Run with D4D_ROUTE_PROVIDER=estimate only for offline draft data; map production routes should be regenerated with OSRM or an approved road-routing API before demo use.
routing_design.final_assembly_destination_policy: Synthetic demo assembly hubs are removed from active planning. Component routes now terminate at the fixed core operating domestic drone manufacturer facilities, not a capacity-ranked top-N subset. Reserve standby drone manufacturer sites are retained as fallback nodes for reconfiguration but are not counted in baseline output. Scenario route choice still considers risk and distance.
production_options: Self-host OSRM/Valhalla/GraphHopper on Korea OSM or government road graph for offline/closed-network planning.
Use Kakao Mobility, NAVER Cloud Directions, or Tmap for commercial Korean road distance, traffic, toll, and ETA when API keys and terms allow.
Persist a route matrix table keyed by origin node, destination node, vehicle profile, scenario, and provider version.

legacy_assembly_hubs_removed.reason: Demo-only logistics/assembly hubs replaced by priority drone manufacturer final-assembly factory destinations.

주요 원자재·부품 재고와 선행 공급처는 확보되어 있는가?
드론 부품 납품에 필요한 검사·품질 기준을 충족할 수 있는가?
정전·연료 제한 시 비상 전력과 물류 지속성이 있는가?
limitations: Open data can estimate likely operating scale but cannot prove spare capacity.
Exact equipment inventory, shift availability, inventory, QA status, and emergency power require verification.
Older rich factory registry rows may differ from the latest lightweight registry snapshot.

manufacturing_profile.speed_basis: capacity profile + part-family complexity + deterministic placeholder variance

verification_need: contracted power and peak demand
customer-side feeder/substation relationship
backup generator capacity and fuel stock
critical process restart time after outage
limitations: Use province/city-cluster load-serving zones rather than exact electric-facility dependency chains.
Expose impact as production-continuity risk, not as an attack target list.
Treat all dependencies as proxy estimates until KEPCO/customer-side supply contracts and facility diagrams are verified.

energy_profile.source: KEA regional industrial electricity context + category/capacity proxy
limitations: Company-level NGMS records cover large emitting/managed entities only.
KEPCO/KEA public electricity data is generally aggregated by region and sector, not every factory.
High energy use can mean high output, but can also mean inefficient processes or low spare capacity.
Final mobilization decisions still require live line availability, workforce, equipment, inventory, and grid reliability checks.

data_limitations: Candidate inferred from public factory registration product text and capacity proxy fields.
Equipment inventory, line availability, QA status, and wartime legal status are not verified.
Coordinates are approximate for demo safety and geocoding stability.

주요 원자재·부품 재고와 선행 공급처는 확보되어 있는가?
드론 부품 납품에 필요한 검사·품질 기준을 충족할 수 있는가?
정전·연료 제한 시 비상 전력과 물류 지속성이 있는가?
limitations: Open data can estimate likely operating scale but cannot prove spare capacity.
Exact equipment inventory, shift availability, inventory, QA status, and emergency power require verification.
Older rich factory registry rows may differ from the latest lightweight registry snapshot.

manufacturing_profile.speed_basis: capacity profile + part-family complexity + deterministic placeholder variance

verification_need: contracted power and peak demand
customer-side feeder/substation relationship
backup generator capacity and fuel stock
critical process restart time after outage
limitations: Use province/city-cluster load-serving zones rather than exact electric-facility dependency chains.
Expose impact as production-continuity risk, not as an attack target list.
Treat all dependencies as proxy estimates until KEPCO/customer-side supply contracts and facility diagrams are verified.

energy_profile.source: KEA regional industrial electricity context + category/capacity proxy
limitations: Company-level NGMS records cover large emitting/managed entities only.
KEPCO/KEA public electricity data is generally aggregated by region and sector, not every factory.
High energy use can mean high output, but can also mean inefficient processes or low spare capacity.
Final mobilization decisions still require live line availability, workforce, equipment, inventory, and grid reliability checks.

data_limitations: Candidate inferred from public factory registration product text and capacity proxy fields.
Equipment inventory, line availability, QA status, and wartime legal status are not verified.
Coordinates are approximate for demo safety and geocoding stability.

주요 원자재·부품 재고와 선행 공급처는 확보되어 있는가?
드론 부품 납품에 필요한 검사·품질 기준을 충족할 수 있는가?
정전·연료 제한 시 비상 전력과 물류 지속성이 있는가?
limitations: Open data can estimate likely operating scale but cannot prove spare capacity.
Exact equipment inventory, shift availability, inventory, QA status, and emergency power require verification.
Older rich factory registry rows may differ from the latest lightweight registry snapshot.

manufacturing_profile.speed_basis: capacity profile + part-family complexity + deterministic placeholder variance

verification_need: contracted power and peak demand
customer-side feeder/substation relationship
backup generator capacity and fuel stock
critical process restart time after outage
limitations: Use province/city-cluster load-serving zones rather than exact electric-facility dependency chains.
Expose impact as production-continuity risk, not as an attack target list.
Treat all dependencies as proxy estimates until KEPCO/customer-side supply contracts and facility diagrams are verified.

energy_profile.source: KEA regional industrial electricity context + category/capacity proxy
limitations: Company-level NGMS records cover large emitting/managed entities only.
KEPCO/KEA public electricity data is generally aggregated by region and sector, not every factory.
High energy use can mean high output, but can also mean inefficient processes or low spare capacity.
Final mobilization decisions still require live line availability, workforce, equipment, inventory, and grid reliability checks.

data_limitations: Candidate inferred from public factory registration product text and capacity proxy fields.
Equipment inventory, line availability, QA status, and wartime legal status are not verified.
Coordinates are approximate for demo safety and geocoding stability.

verification_questions: 현재 생산라인 중 전환 가능한 설비와 공정은 무엇인가?
30일 기준 추가 교대 투입 시 산출 가능량은 얼마인가?
주요 원자재·부품 재고와 선행 공급처는 확보되어 있는가?
드론 부품 납품에 필요한 검사·품질 기준을 충족할 수 있는가?
정전·연료 제한 시 비상 전력과 물류 지속성이 있는가?
limitations: Open data can estimate likely operating scale but cannot prove spare capacity.
Exact equipment inventory, shift availability, inventory, QA status, and emergency power require verification.
Older rich factory registry rows may differ from the latest lightweight registry snapshot.

manufacturing_profile.speed_basis: capacity profile + part-family complexity + deterministic placeholder variance

verification_need: contracted power and peak demand
customer-side feeder/substation relationship
backup generator capacity and fuel stock
critical process restart time after outage
limitations: Use province/city-cluster load-serving zones rather than exact electric-facility dependency chains.
Expose impact as production-continuity risk, not as an attack target list.
Treat all dependencies as proxy estimates until KEPCO/customer-side supply contracts and facility diagrams are verified.

energy_profile.source: KEA regional industrial electricity context + category/capacity proxy
limitations: Company-level NGMS records cover large emitting/managed entities only.
KEPCO/KEA public electricity data is generally aggregated by region and sector, not every factory.
High energy use can mean high output, but can also mean inefficient processes or low spare capacity.
Final mobilization decisions still require live line availability, workforce, equipment, inventory, and grid reliability checks.

data_limitations: Candidate inferred from public factory registration product text and capacity proxy fields.
Equipment inventory, line availability, QA status, and wartime legal status are not verified.
Coordinates are approximate for demo safety and geocoding stability.

grid_risk_zones.name: 경기도 industrial load-serving risk zone
grid_risk_zones.source: KEA regional industrial electricity + KEPCO large-customer equipment context + candidate factory distribution
limitations: Use province/city-cluster load-serving zones rather than exact electric-facility dependency chains.
Expose impact as production-continuity risk, not as an attack target list.
Treat all dependencies as proxy estimates until KEPCO/customer-side supply contracts and facility diagrams are verified.

grid_disruption_scenarios.name: 경기도 load-serving degradation
grid_disruption_scenarios.safe_boundary: Coarse continuity-planning scenario; not an electric-facility targeting model.
recommended_reconfiguration: reduce new allocations to affected factories until power status is verified
prioritize factories with backup power and lower grid dependency score
hold in-transit shipments only when receiving factory outage probability crosses threshold

receiver chipset, antenna stock, connector format, and field failure/cannibalization rate
connector standard, capacitor stock, cable gauge, and kit completeness
fiber length, spool QA, payout packaging, and transport damage rate

cell origin lot, pack assembly line, BMS stock, connector format, and FIFO aging policy

model_limitations: Synthetic inventory/ramp defaults; replace with ERP/MES/procurement feeds.
Component-level demand is FPV-class demo profile only; medium/large systems are future profile extensions.
No payload, targeting, or build instruction data is included.

stats.pipeline_shortlist_route_policy: shortlist first; road-route matrix should be expanded only for shortlisted candidates

apac_extension.title: APAC gray-zone denied-environment allied sustainment C2
design_direction: Treat APAC logistics nodes as coalition-maintained resource pools with source confidence.
Fuse equipment maintenance demand, local sourcing, depot capacity, route risk, and communications state.
Run min-cost flow / resilient routing to allocate parts and maintenance kits under denied logistics corridors.
Show local procurement and distribution monitoring as aggregate resource classes rather than sensitive facility-level data.
